checks.googleSignInInlineError: Google sign-in could not start. Confirm Firebase Google provider and authorized domains, then try again.

notes: Places autocomplete loaded live on the deployed Cloud Run app and rendered Google Maps predictions while typing.
Google sign-in button is visible and opens the auth flow, but Firebase returns an authorized-domain/provider-start error in the public deployment.
Manual Firebase Console action is required before claiming Google sign-in works end to end.

The civic image used in the first broad smoke was misclassified as low-confidence because the downloaded Unsplash image was not a pothole; the waffle negative guard also showed low-confidence clarification.
Unhelpful framing screenshots were omitted from the committed evidence set; manifest keeps only useful public app captures.
